from urllib.parse import urlparse

def enrich_links(links: list[str], base_url: str) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for link in links:
        parsed = urlparse(base_url)
        link_parsed = urlparse(link)
        if link_parsed.netloc == parsed.netloc:
            results.append({"url": link, "internal": True})
        else:
            results.append({"url": link, "internal": False})
    return results

def filter_valid_urls(urls: list[str], allowed_domain: str) -> list[str]:
    valid = []
    for url in urls:
        parsed = urlparse(url)
        if parsed.netloc == allowed_domain:
            valid.append(url)
    return valid

def rewrite_paths(urls: list[str], base: str) -> list[str]:
    rewritten = []
    base_parsed = urlparse(base)
    for url in urls:
        url_parsed = urlparse(url)
        new_url = f"{base_parsed.scheme}://{base_parsed.netloc}{url_parsed.path}"
        rewritten.append(new_url)
    return rewritten
